seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Denial Bay and Devlins Pound. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Denial Bay vs Devlins Pound: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Denial Bay and Devlins Pound.
heading: Denial Bay vs Devlins Pound — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Denial Bay, South Australia and Devlins Pound, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Devlins Pound has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Denial Bay (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Denial Bay or Devlins Pound safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Denial Bay has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Devlins Pound scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Denial Bay scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Devlins Pound scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Denial Bay or Devlins Pound?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Devlins Pound has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
